summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AS Moloobhoy Marine Services dual dashboard application. Backend API fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend UI working correctly with proper theme switching, data integration, and user interactions. Minor DOM timing issue identified but doesn't affect core functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: DOM element detachment error when clicking buttons after API updates
ui_bugs.impact: Occasional click failures but functionality works on retry

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby accessibility attribute warning in console

passed_tests: All 33 backend API endpoints (sales vessels, quotes, leads, stats, ops jobs, feed, certificates)
Vessel action buttons (Call, Quote, Assign, Note)
Job status updates (Acknowledge, Start, Complete, Flag)
Theme switching between Sales (light) and Operations (dark)
Vessel feed and certificate expiry panels display

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor DOM timing issue
